final_prompt.prompt:
Create a detailed technical illustration of a Sony A7 camera disassembly showing all internal components.

Style/medium: needs a technical diagram / exploded view aesthetic — exact illustration style and rendering technique are yours
Composition: must be exploded-view layout with all components separated and visible
Subject: must include all Sony A7 camera components with their names labeled:
  - Body / chassis
  - Image sensor
  - Main circuit board (PCB)
  - Shutter mechanism
  - Viewfinder (EVF)
  - LCD screen assembly
  - Battery compartment
  - Memory card slot
  - Lens mount
  - IBIS (In-Body Image Stabilization) unit
  - Heat sink / thermal management
  - Buttons and dials assembly
  - Ports and connectors (USB, HDMI, microphone, headphone)
  - Grip assembly
  - Weather sealing gaskets
Scene/backdrop: needs a clean neutral background — exact tone is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a technical/product photography lighting — exact light placement is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: needs a mix of metallic, plastic, and electronic component textures — exact surface treatment is yours
Text (verbatim): must include component names in Spanish as labeled callouts (e.g., "Sensor de imagen", "Obturador", "Pantalla LCD", "Montura de lente E", "Estabilizador de imagen", "Tarjeta de memoria", "Batería NP-FZ100", etc.)
Constraints: must preserve accurate Sony A7 internal architecture, all major components visible and labeled
Avoid: must avoid incorrect component placement, must avoid generic camera parts that don't match A7 series specifications
